source_file: AEO Certification Series (I) The Customs Credit System that You Might Not Have Noticed - Lexology.txt
text:
AEO certification based on the enterprise credit status can not only provide opportunities
for enterprises to break through the dilemma when they encounter difficulties, but also
bring competitive advantages for the development of enterprises. As mentioned in Case 1,
more and more multinational enterprises take AEO certification as one of the conditions
for selecting suppliers. In practice, suppliers with AEO certification are preferred partners
of enterprises even if the enterprises do not take AEO certification as a necessary
condition.
